title: Analytics Roadmap
content_html:
Analytics Roadmap

Analytics roadmap items cover semantic models, tag workflows, and Data Sharing capabilities owned by Analytics.

Features

  • LLM Integration — advisory semantic assistance with domain-owned review and apply boundaries.
  • Tag Dimensions — exploratory dimension definitions, representations, scoring, and projections.
  • Portable Document Packages — source-faithful Data Sharing packages, currently limited to export.
  • Shareable Content Blocks — bounded source exchange and reviewed writeback.

Current Position

The portable full-document export is the only in-progress delivery. LLM Integration and Tag Dimensions remain paused ideas. Shareable Content Blocks remains conceptual.
